notes: Three search piles at Ward C: the nurses' station (binder, chapel candles, vigil log), the gurney in the corridor, the wheelchair near ward 1. Items are small mercies, not power-ups.

the_chart_binder.label: The chart binder
the_chart_binder.flavor: Maroon vinyl. Pearl closed it at 11. The five names inside are the last five names Ward C will carry.

the_chapel_candles.label: Five small chapel candles
the_chapel_candles.flavor: Beeswax. Pearl brought them down from the cupboard at 11:30. The wicks are old. The first two of them won't take on the first match.

effects.text: Candles in hand. ROUND will light them, one per ward.

the_vigil_log.label: The vigil log
the_vigil_log.flavor: Smaller binder. Chaplain's hand only. The last entry is from the closing of Ward B in '04, signed by Father Eaves.

a_folded_sheet.label: A folded sheet (gurney)
a_folded_sheet.flavor: The standard hospital sheet, folded into thirds the way orderlies are taught to fold. Slightly warm from the radiator.

an_id_band.label: An ID band (blank)
an_id_band.flavor: Plastic wrist band. White. Unwritten. The ward had been ordering a hundred at a time since '88. Half a box left.

a_vial_of_holy_oil.label: Vial of holy oil
a_vial_of_holy_oil.flavor: Glass, capped, in your apron pocket. From the chapel cabinet. For anointing the doorway after the last vigil — the chaplain's small private rite.

effects.text: Holy oil. You can anoint the south door before you leave.

a_lap_blanket.label: A lap blanket (folded)
a_lap_blanket.flavor: Knit. Heavy. The Lavigne family donated a stack of these to Ward C in '08, the spring after their father.

the_wheel_brake_key.label: The wheel brake key
the_wheel_brake_key.flavor: Tiny brass. The wheelchair's brake has been seized since June. The key is on the ring at the station. It does not, this evening, get used.

found_dentures.label: Found dentures
found_dentures.flavor: In a cup at the bedside. Nobody, at the transfer Wednesday, claimed them. Pearl set them on the wheelchair seat in case someone came back for them. Nobody has.
